Mtn For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Apr-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Eric r. Brenneman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Allstate Insurance Company
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Helena Mong and Bolden Liu, individually and dba Platinum Hills, Inc.; 1 Unique Auto; Bee Towing and Automotive.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Russ Partener sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $2,900.39
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,270.60
Attorney's Fees: $4,585.60
Costs: $824.75
Total Judgment in the amount of $9,581.24
Judgment signed in open court.
